  "R1.2": "The agent thoroughly examined the argument chain, identifying multiple inconsistencies and proposing specific repairs, demonstrating end-to-end analysis.",

  "RX.1": "The agent effectively disclosed uncertainties by softening overconfident statements and highlighting assumptions, enhancing transparency.",

rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly examined the argument chain, identifying multiple inconsistencies and proposing specific repairs, demonstrating end-to-end analysis.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audited each major claim against the provided evidence, ensuring alignment and suggesting precise revisions where necessary.
rationale.RX.1: The agent effectively disclosed uncertainties by softening overconfident statements and highlighting assumptions, enhancing transparency.
rationale.RX.3: The output remained strictly within the specified scope without any deviations, addressing all relevant dimensions as required.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; instead, the agent identified and mitigated potential issues in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes were traced, minor edits lacked annotations, preventing a perfect score but still showing strong traceability.
